name: production-playwright-framework
description: Production-style Playwright automation framework demonstrated against the Forecast Workbench SUT

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix apps/workbench && npm install --prefix e2e
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix apps/workbench && npm run typecheck --prefix e2e
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run build && npm run test:smoke
